items.explain: Plain readlink shows the stored target, not a full resolve.

choices: Returns a cleaned absolute path and follows symlinks
items.explain: realpath canonicalizes: absolute, no . / .., symlinks followed.

items.prompt: realpath usually fails on a broken symlink because the final target does not exist.
items.explain: Strict realpath needs a resolvable final path; readlink can still print the stored string.

items.prompt: A common script use of realpath is…
choices: Getting the absolute directory of a script or file
items.explain: Scripts often resolve their own directory to absolute form.
